events.title: openai/codex 0.137.0
events.summaryText: ## New Features - TUI controls now support F13-F24 keybindings, paste in searchable menus, and a compact reasoning-only status/title item (#25329, #25400, #25504). - Enterprise/admin flows now show monthly credit limits and can apply cloud-managed config bundles, including EDU workspaces (#24812, #24617, #24619, #24620, #24622, #25963). - Remote-control clients can start pairing and list or revoke controller grants through app-server v2 RPCs (#25675, #25785). - Plugin workflows gained machine...

events.title: @openai/codex 0.137.0
events.summaryText: Codex CLI is a coding agent from OpenAI that runs locally on your computer.
